summary: Shared TaskCard and TaskQueue with session-scoped no-op executor: approve/dismiss update sessionStorage only, inline feedback and demo copy, no API calls. Ready for workflow pages #119–#121.

interfaceChanges.description: Reusable task card with severity, GMV impact, approve/dismiss CTAs.
Renders active mock tasks with no-op executor and demo notice.
Client hook for approve/dismiss with sessionStorage persistence.
Analytics event for task approve/dismiss (no backend).

mappings.criterion: Shared task card renders title, body, severity, CTA, and optional GMV impact
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_card_executor.test.tsx::renders title, body, severity, CTA, and optional GMV impact

mappings.criterion: Approve moves task to acknowledged/completed state; dismiss removes from active queue
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_card_executor.test.tsx::approve then dismiss on separate tasks updates queue correctly

mappings.criterion: Visual confirmation on approve/dismiss (toast or inline)
Demo tooltip or copy states Phase 1 is mock-only (no real execution)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_card_executor.test.tsx::shows demo-mode copy that Phase 1 does not execute on TikTok

mappings.criterion: Session persistence: dismissals survive navigation within session
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_card_executor.test.tsx::session persistence: dismissals survive remount within session

mappings.criterion: Integration test: approve then dismiss on separate tasks updates queue correctly
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_card_executor.test.tsx::approve then dismiss on separate tasks updates queue correctly
web/src/__tests__/test_task_card_executor.test.tsx::no API calls on approve or dismiss
